name: Exchanges for Special Foods (Vegetarian)
recipeIngredient: Kefir - 1 cup = 1 milk exchange + 1 fat exchange
Miso - 3 tablespoons = 1 bread exchange + 1/2 lean meat exchange
Sea vegetables, cooked - 1/2 cup = 1 vegetable exchange
Soy flour - 1/4 cup = 1 lean meat exchange + 1/2 bread exchange
Soy grits, raw - 1/8 cup = 1 lean meat exchange
Soy milk - 1 cup = 1 milk exchange + 1 fat exchange
Tempeh - 4 ounces = 1 bread exchange + 2 protein exchanges
recipeInstructions: For vegetarians, treat legumes as 1/2 protein and 1 bread exchange rather than just a bread exchange. Consider using low-fat, high-fiber recipes to ensure balanced nutrition.
